productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid White Shirt
description: Composition White shirt with waffle weave made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with double buttoned cuffs, cutaway collar with removable stiffeners, buttoned placket with pearlescent white buttons and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash delicateWash and dry inside out Line dry in shade Warm ironDry clean delicate Do not wring, do not tumble dry, do not bleach A special weave and cutaway collar gives this white shirt an exclusive, luxurious look, it's a cut above the standard formal shirt. Impeccable construction, attention to detail and smart stripes place this shirt firmly ahead of the pack &ndash wear with confidence tucked into formal trousers. Model statistics The model wears a size M in shirts with height 6' and shoulders 18"
